_doc: Tier-1 MBA seed buckets curated from Tier1_MBA_Bucket_Framework.xlsx (v1.0 — April 2026). Covers the canonical 20 buckets across 9 domains for top-20 Indian MBA placement (IIM A/B/C/L/K/I, XLRI, FMS, MDI, SPJIMR, ISB, IIFT, NMIMS). Run scripts/seed-job-buckets.ts to apply. Status starts as 'candidate' so they are hidden from non-admin users until validated. CTC bands (LPA) and selectivity notes are sourced from the workbook's Bucket Summary; nature_of_work/aliases derived from the Bucket Playbook.

buckets.name: MBB Strategy Consulting
buckets.nature_of_work: End-to-end problem-solving for C-suite clients; hypothesis-driven analysis; slide-based recommendations; frequent travel; global exposure. CTC band ~45-80 LPA (median ~58). Very high selectivity — top 10-15% of IIM A/B/C.

buckets.name: Big 4 Strategy & Advisory Consulting
buckets.nature_of_work: Advisory projects across Strategy, Finance transformation, Digital, M&A; structured engagements; sector practices (BFSI, TMT, Healthcare). CTC band ~25-50 LPA (median ~35). High selectivity — IIM A-C, XLRI, FMS, MDI, SPJIMR.

buckets.name: Boutique & Tier-2 Management Consulting
buckets.nature_of_work: Sector-specific or operations-focused consulting; restructuring mandates; smaller teams; faster Partner track. CTC band ~22-42 LPA (median ~30). Medium-high selectivity — IIM A-C, IIM L/K/I, XLRI, FMS, MDI.

buckets.name: IT Consulting, GCC & Digital Transformation
buckets.nature_of_work: Technology-enabled business transformation; ERP implementations; analytics/AI advisory; GCC setup projects. CTC band ~18-35 LPA (median ~24). Medium selectivity — IIM L through NMIMS/IMT range; ZS also at IIM A/B/C.

buckets.name: Bulge Bracket & Premium Investment Banking
buckets.nature_of_work: M&A advisory; ECM / DCM deal execution; sector coverage; financial modelling; client pitches; extremely high intensity. CTC band ~35-90 LPA (median ~52). Very high selectivity — primarily IIM A/B/C, XLRI Finance, FMS.

buckets.name: Private Equity, VC & Hedge Funds
buckets.nature_of_work: Deal sourcing, due diligence, portfolio monitoring; thesis-driven investment analysis; board representation. CTC band ~30-80 LPA (median ~50). Extremely high selectivity — almost exclusively IIM A/B/C; very few offers per season.

buckets.name: Boutique IB, Debt Markets & Corporate Finance
buckets.nature_of_work: Indian M&A, IPO, QIP, NCD issuance; sector-focused coverage; smaller teams; faster deal exposure. CTC band ~18-42 LPA (median ~27). Medium selectivity — IIM A-C, IIM L/K/I, XLRI, SPJIMR.

buckets.name: Wealth, Asset Management & Financial Markets
buckets.nature_of_work: Portfolio construction; client asset allocation; fund management support; wealth advisory for HNI/UHNI clients. CTC band ~16-40 LPA (median ~24). Medium selectivity — IIM A-C, IIM L/K/I, NMIMS Mumbai finance stream.

buckets.name: BFSI Corporate Banking & Management Programs
buckets.nature_of_work: Retail / corporate banking; credit product management; FinTech growth roles; priority banking RMs; digital product. CTC band ~14-30 LPA (median ~20). Low-medium selectivity — IIM newer + IIFT/NMIMS/IMT.

buckets.name: FMCG Brand Management & Category Marketing
buckets.nature_of_work: Brand P&L ownership; consumer research; media planning; NPD (new product development); agency management; category strategy. CTC band ~20-40 LPA (median ~28). High selectivity — IIM A-C dominant; IIM L/K, XLRI, MDI, SPJIMR also strong.

buckets.name: Commercial Excellence, Enterprise & Channel Sales
buckets.nature_of_work: Channel and distributor management; trade marketing activation; enterprise account management; revenue and volume targets. CTC band ~15-30 LPA (median ~20). Medium selectivity — IIM L through NMIMS/IMT range.

buckets.name: International Trade, EXIM & Global Commercial
buckets.nature_of_work: Cross-border trade execution; export documentation; import sourcing; forex risk management; global supply chain oversight. CTC band ~16-35 LPA (median ~22). Low-medium selectivity — IIFT Delhi/Kolkata primary feeder; some IIM L/K/I.

buckets.name: General Management LDPs & Corporate MT Programs
buckets.nature_of_work: Cross-functional rotational assignments; strategy, operations, sales, finance exposures in Year 1-2; aimed at future business leaders. CTC band ~15-32 LPA (median ~22). Medium selectivity — accessible to top IIMs + XLRI/FMS/MDI through NMIMS/IMT.

buckets.name: Global Tech — Product Management & Business Strategy
buckets.nature_of_work: Product strategy and roadmap; go-to-market planning; data-driven prioritisation; cross-functional leadership; P&L responsibility. CTC band ~30-65 LPA (median ~45). Very high selectivity — primarily IIM A/B/C + ISB + IIM L for select roles.

buckets.name: Indian Tech & Unicorn — PM, Growth & Business Roles
buckets.nature_of_work: 0-to-1 product building; growth experiments; metric ownership; cross-functional collaboration; rapid iteration. CTC band ~22-55 LPA (median ~35). High selectivity — IIM A-C, IIM L/K/I, XLRI, ISB; growing access at MDI/SPJIMR.

buckets.name: E-commerce & New-Age Operations Management
buckets.nature_of_work: Warehouse and fulfilment operations; last-mile network design; capacity planning; vendor and 3PL management. CTC band ~18-38 LPA (median ~26). Medium selectivity — IIM L through NMIMS/IMT; Amazon Ops at all top IIMs.

buckets.name: Manufacturing, Supply Chain & Industrial Operations
buckets.standardized_title: Management Trainee — Operations / Supply Chain Manager
buckets.nature_of_work: Production planning; supplier development; quality management; cost optimisation; plant operations; global procurement. CTC band ~14-30 LPA (median ~20). Low-medium selectivity — IIM newer campuses, IIFT, NMIMS, IMT.

buckets.name: HR Leadership, Talent Strategy & People Operations
buckets.nature_of_work: HR Business Partnering; talent strategy; organisational development; culture building; DEIB initiatives; people analytics. CTC band ~14-30 LPA (median ~20). Medium selectivity — XLRI HRM stream dominant; IIM Shillong, MDI HR stream.

buckets.name: Advanced Analytics, Data Strategy & AI Consulting
buckets.nature_of_work: Data-driven business insights; predictive modelling; AI/ML model productionisation; decision science for commercial problems. CTC band ~20-48 LPA (median ~30). Medium-high selectivity — accessible to IIM A-C, IIM L/K/I, IIFT, ISB.

buckets.name: Healthcare, Pharma Strategy & Specialty Sectors
buckets.nature_of_work: Pharma commercial strategy; market access; healthcare consulting; hospital operations; medtech business development. CTC band ~14-30 LPA (median ~20). Low-medium selectivity — IIM newer campuses + ISB (healthcare consulting); ZS also at IIM A/B/C.
